## Problem Or Use Case

What practice, teaching, accessibility, or maintenance problem would this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the change you want.

## Users Affected

Who benefits? Students, instructors, mobile users, screen-reader users, curriculum authors, maintainers, or another group?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternate design you considered.

## Context

Add lesson names, preset names, Tom-style links, screenshots, or examples that clarify the request.
